case_7_1.rephrased_problem: Automate manual data entry tasks and provide real-time dashboards to reduce operational costs by 15% and increase data-driven decision-making by 20% within the next 6 months.
clarified_assumptions: Manual data entry tasks are currently time-consuming and prone to errors
Leadership lacks real-time visibility into operational performance
Teams have limited resources to dedicate to data analysis and reporting
case_7_1.proposed_solution: Develop a cloud-based AI-powered automation platform that integrates with existing systems to automate data entry tasks and provide real-time dashboards for leadership and teams.
key_features: Automated data entry using machine learning algorithms
Real-time dashboards for operational performance monitoring
Customizable alerts and notifications for anomalies and trends
Integration with existing systems for seamless data exchange
data_needed: Current system APIs and data formats
success_metrics: Reduction in manual data entry tasks by 80%
implementation_steps: Conduct stakeholder interviews and requirements gathering
Integrate with existing systems and test
risks: Data quality issues impacting automation accuracy
User resistance to adopting new technology
Dependence on third-party APIs and services

case_7_2.rephrased_requirement: Design and implement a file upload and question answering AI feature that provides accurate responses within a specified time frame, ensuring the security and integrity of user data and uploaded files.
functional_requirements: Users can upload files in various formats (e.g., PDF, DOCX, TXT) up to a maximum size of 10MB
Users can input questions related to the uploaded file content
The system analyzes the uploaded file and provides relevant answers to user queries
The system supports a minimum of 100 concurrent user sessions
The system stores uploaded files for a maximum of 30 days, after which they are automatically deleted
non_functional_requirements: The system responds to user queries within 5 seconds (average response time) and 10 seconds (maximum response time) for 95% of user interactions
The system achieves an accuracy rate of 90% or higher for correct answers, as measured by a predefined test dataset
The system is available 24/7, with a minimum uptime of 99.5% per month
security_requirements: All user data and uploaded files are encrypted in transit using HTTPS and at rest using AES-256
The system implements authentication and authorization mechanisms to ensure only authorized users can access and manage their uploaded files and query history
The system logs all user interactions and system events, with logs stored for a minimum of 6 months
acceptance_criteria: The system correctly answers a minimum of 90% of test queries from a predefined dataset
The system responds to user queries within the specified response time limits for 95% of user interactions
The system successfully uploads and processes files of various formats and sizes up to 10MB
The system passes security vulnerability scans and penetration testing
case_7_2.recommended_solution_approach: Utilize a cloud-based infrastructure (e.g., AWS, Azure) to design a scalable and secure architecture. Implement a microservices-based design, with separate services for file upload, question answering, and user management. Leverage natural language processing (NLP) and machine learning (ML) libraries (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) to develop the question answering AI feature. Ensure compliance with relevant data protection regulations (e.g., GDPR, CCPA) and implement robust monitoring and logging mechanisms.
open_questions: What is the expected volume of user traffic and uploaded files, and how will the system scale to accommodate growth?
What are the specific file formats and types that need to be supported, and are there any specific requirements for handling sensitive or confidential data?
What is the desired level of customization for the question answering AI feature, and are there any specific NLP or ML models that need to be integrated?
